name: frontend-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert UI engineer focused on crafting robust, scalable frontend solutions. Builds high-quality React components prioritizing maintainability, user experience, and web standards compliance.
description_zh: 一个结构清晰、内容全面的前端开发技能，涵盖了现代框架、可访问性、性能和测试，执行流程明确。
_original_description: A comprehensive frontend development skill with excellent structure, covering modern frameworks, accessibility, performance, and testing with clear execution protocols.

name: fullstack-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: End-to-end feature owner with expertise across the entire stack. Delivers complete solutions from database to UI with focus on seamless integration and optimal user experience.
description_zh: 该技能为全栈开发提供结构化工作流，指导用户从数据库设计到前端实现。它强调跨层一致性、类型安全和端到端测试。提示包含具体的身份验证、实时功能和部署清单，是构建完整功能的实用指南。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured workflow for full-stack development, guiding users from database design to frontend implementation. It emphasizes cross-layer consistency, type safety, and end-to-end testing. The prompt includes specific checklists for authentication, real-time features, and deployment, making it a practical guide for building cohesive features.

name: game-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert game developer specializing in game engine programming, graphics optimization, and multiplayer systems. Masters game design patterns, performance optimization, and cross-platform development with focus on creating engaging, performant gaming experiences.
description_zh: 专注于游戏开发的智能体，支持Unity、Unreal、Godot和网页框架。提供从架构设计、图形渲染到物理模拟、AI和网络联机的结构化工作流，明确设定60帧、3秒加载等性能目标。
_original_description: A specialized agent for game development tasks covering Unity, Unreal, Godot, and web frameworks. Provides structured workflows for architecture, graphics, physics, AI, and networking with specific performance targets like 60 FPS and load times under 3 seconds.

name: git-workflow-manager
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Git workflow manager specializing in branching strategies, automation, and team collaboration. Masters Git workflows, merge conflict resolution, and repository management with focus on enabling efficient, clear, and scalable version control practices.
description_zh: 一个全面的Git工作流管理技能，提供分支策略、自动化和团队协作的结构化指导，具有清晰的实施阶段和集成能力。
_original_description: A comprehensive Git workflow management skill offering structured guidance on branching strategies, automation, and team collaboration with clear implementation phases and integration capabilities.

name: github
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when interacting with github
description_zh: 一个极简的GitHub技能，仅作为元包装器存在，缺乏实际功能、实现细节、示例或清晰的使用说明。
_original_description: A minimal GitHub skill that serves as a meta-wrapper without providing actual functionality, lacking implementation details, examples, or clear usage instructions.

name: golang-pro
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Go developer specializing in high-performance systems, concurrent programming, and cloud-native microservices. Masters idiomatic Go patterns with emphasis on simplicity, efficiency, and reliability.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构良好的Go开发专家技能，广泛涵盖了惯用模式、并发、测试和云原生开发实践。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured Go development expert skill with extensive coverage of idiomatic patterns, concurrency, testing, and cloud-native development practices.

name: graphql-architect
author: zenobi-us
description: GraphQL schema architect designing efficient, scalable API graphs. Masters federation, subscriptions, and query optimization while ensuring type safety and developer experience.
description_zh: 专注于使用Apollo设计和构建联邦GraphQL架构的专家。核心功能包括模式设计、查询优化、订阅实现和联邦模式集成。技能包含用于模式验证和代码生成的特定MCP工具，为分布式服务中实现类型安全的GraphQL系统提供结构化工作流程。
_original_description: A specialized expert for designing federated GraphQL architectures with Apollo. It focuses on schema design, query optimization, subscription setup, and federation patterns. The skill includes specific MCP tools for schema validation and code generation, providing structured workflows for implementing type-safe GraphQL systems across distributed services.

name: incident-responder
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert incident responder specializing in security and operational incident management. Masters evidence collection, forensic analysis, and coordinated response with focus on minimizing impact and preventing future incidents.
description_zh: 该技能为处理安全和运维事件提供了一个结构化框架。它定义了清晰的响应阶段，集成了PagerDuty、Jira等常见事件管理工具，并包含证据收集、沟通和事后审查的清单。适用于需要标准化事件处理流程的团队。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for handling security and operational incidents. It defines clear response phases, integrates with common incident management tools like PagerDuty and Jira, and includes checklists for evidence collection, communication, and post-incident review. It's designed for teams needing consistent incident handling procedures.

name: inmemoria
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when building persistent codebase intelligence for AI agents or integrating knowledge systems via MCP
description_zh: In Memoria 为AI代理通过MCP构建代码库的持久语义理解。它一次性学习项目模式，然后无需重新解析即可提供智能。包含设置、学习、检查、监视和服务器命令。适用于Claude、Copilot和其他MCP工具。
_original_description: In Memoria builds persistent semantic understanding of codebases for AI agents via MCP. It learns project patterns once, then serves that intelligence without re-parsing. Includes setup, learn, check, watch, and server commands. Works with Claude, Copilot, and other MCP tools.

name: iot-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert IoT engineer specializing in connected device architectures, edge computing, and IoT platform development. Masters IoT protocols, device management, and data pipelines with focus on building scalable, secure, and reliable IoT solutions.
description_zh: 提供用于设计和实施物联网解决方案的MCP工具和工作流，涵盖设备连接、边缘计算、云平台集成和数据管道。包含结构化检查清单，以及对接MQTT、AWS IoT和Azure IoT的特定工具，通过预定义的协议支持系统化的物联网项目开展。
_original_description: Provides MCP tools and workflows for designing and implementing IoT solutions, covering device connectivity, edge processing, cloud integration, and data pipelines. It includes structured checklists, specific tool integrations for MQTT, AWS IoT, and Azure IoT, and predefined communication protocols for systematic IoT project execution.

name: java-architect
author: zenobi-us
description: Senior Java architect specializing in enterprise-grade applications, Spring ecosystem, and cloud-native development. Masters modern Java features, reactive programming, and microservices patterns with focus on scalability and maintainability.
description_zh: 扮演企业级Java应用的高级架构师角色。分析现有Java/Spring项目结构，审查架构设计，并为微服务、响应式编程和云原生模式提供实施指导。集成构建工具和测试框架以强制执行最佳实践。
_original_description: Acts as a senior Java architect for enterprise applications. It analyzes existing Java/Spring projects, reviews architecture, and provides implementation guidance for microservices, reactive programming, and cloud-native patterns. It integrates with build tools and testing frameworks to enforce best practices.

name: javascript-pro
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert JavaScript developer specializing in modern ES2023+ features, asynchronous programming, and full-stack development. Masters both browser APIs and Node.js ecosystem with emphasis on performance and clean code patterns.
description_zh: 该技能为现代ES2023+ JavaScript开发提供详细指导，涵盖代码分析、实现模式和质量保证。包含项目评估、开发阶段和与其他智能体集成的完整工作流程，支持Node.js和浏览器环境。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for JavaScript development with modern ES2023+ features. It covers code analysis, implementation patterns, and quality assurance with specific tool integrations. The workflow includes project assessment, development phases, and integration with other agents for full-stack work.

name: jira
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when needing to search Jira issues, retrieve issue details, get pull request links, or manage issue workflows programmatically - provides complete workflows and examples for common Jira automation tasks using the atlassian CLI
description_zh: 该技能通过Atlassian MCP服务器提供基于Shell的Jira自动化。它涵盖了搜索问题、获取详情、状态转换和添加评论等常见操作。文档清晰地解释了所需的函数调用语法，并包含用于设置的辅助脚本。
_original_description: This skill provides shell-based automation for Jira using the Atlassian MCP server. It covers common operations like searching issues, getting details, transitioning statuses, and adding comments. The documentation clearly explains the required function-call syntax and includes helper scripts for setup.

name: knowledge-synthesizer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert knowledge synthesizer specializing in extracting insights from multi-agent interactions, identifying patterns, and building collective intelligence. Masters cross-agent learning, best practice extraction, and continuous system improvement through knowledge management.
description_zh: 一个专门从多智能体交互中提取见解的专家。它分析工作流、识别模式并构建知识图谱以提出改进建议，通过向量和图数据库集成来存储和检索学习成果。
_original_description: A specialized agent for extracting insights from multi-agent interactions. It analyzes workflows, identifies patterns, and builds a knowledge graph to suggest improvements. It integrates with vector and graph databases to store and retrieve learnings.

name: kotlin-specialist
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Kotlin developer specializing in coroutines, multiplatform development, and Android applications. Masters functional programming patterns, DSL design, and modern Kotlin features with emphasis on conciseness and safety.
description_zh: 专注于现代Kotlin特性、协程和多平台项目的开发助手。提供结构化工作流，用于项目分析、代码实现和质量检查，使用detekt、ktlint等工具。强调地道代码、函数式编程和跨平台代码复用。
_original_description: A specialized Kotlin development assistant focused on modern Kotlin features, coroutines, and multiplatform projects. It provides structured workflows for project analysis, implementation, and quality checks using tools like detekt and ktlint. The skill emphasizes idiomatic code, functional patterns, and cross-platform code sharing.

name: kubernetes-specialist
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Kubernetes specialist mastering container orchestration, cluster management, and cloud-native architectures. Specializes in production-grade deployments, security hardening, and performance optimization with focus on scalability and reliability.
description_zh: 一个专业的Kubernetes专家工具，提供全面的集群管理、工作负载编排和安全加固功能。它集成了多个K8s工具（kubectl、helm、kustomize），并遵循结构化工作流程来分析、实施和排查生产级Kubernetes环境问题。
_original_description: A specialized Kubernetes expert that provides comprehensive cluster management, workload orchestration, and security hardening. It integrates multiple K8s tools (kubectl, helm, kustomize) and follows structured workflows for analysis, implementation, and troubleshooting of production-grade Kubernetes environments.

name: laravel-specialist
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Laravel specialist mastering Laravel 10+ with modern PHP practices. Specializes in elegant syntax, Eloquent ORM, queue systems, and enterprise features with focus on building scalable web applications and APIs.
description_zh: 一个专业的 Laravel 开发助手，为构建 Laravel 10+ 应用程序提供结构化工作流程。包含架构规划、实现模式和与 artisan、composer、pest 等工具集成的检查清单。强调现代 PHP 实践、Eloquent ORM 优化和企业级功能。
_original_description: A specialized Laravel development assistant that provides structured workflows for building Laravel 10+ applications. It includes checklists for architecture planning, implementation patterns, and integration with tools like artisan, composer, and pest. The skill emphasizes modern PHP practices, Eloquent ORM optimization, and enterprise features.

name: legal-advisor
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert legal advisor specializing in technology law, compliance, and risk mitigation. Masters contract drafting, intellectual property, data privacy, and regulatory compliance with focus on protecting business interests while enabling innovation and growth.
description_zh: 该技能为科技企业提供法律顾问服务，处理合同审查、合规检查和政策起草。它使用Markdown和LaTeX创建文档，并与DocuSign集成处理电子签名。遵循从评估到实施的结构化工作流程，提供实用的法律指导。
_original_description: This skill acts as a legal advisor for tech businesses, handling contract reviews, compliance checks, and policy drafting. It uses markdown and LaTeX for document creation and integrates with DocuSign for signatures. The skill follows a structured workflow from assessment to implementation, focusing on practical legal guidance.

name: llm-architect
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert LLM architect specializing in large language model architecture, deployment, and optimization. Masters LLM system design, fine-tuning strategies, and production serving with focus on building scalable, efficient, and safe LLM applications.
description_zh: 为大型语言模型系统设计、部署和优化提供结构化指导，涵盖架构、微调、RAG和服务优化。包含延迟、吞吐量和安全性的具体检查清单。集成transformers、LangChain和vLLM等工具进行实施。
_original_description: Provides structured guidance for designing and deploying LLM systems, covering architecture, fine-tuning, RAG, and serving optimization. Includes concrete checklists for latency, throughput, and safety. Integrates with transformers, LangChain, and vLLM tools for implementation.

name: machine-learning-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert ML engineer specializing in production model deployment, serving infrastructure, and scalable ML systems. Masters model optimization, real-time inference, and edge deployment with focus on reliability and performance at scale.
description_zh: 该技能为机器学习模型的生产部署提供结构化指导，涵盖模型优化、服务基础设施搭建、性能调优和监控。其检查清单和工作流帮助工程师系统性地解决实际ML系统的延迟、吞吐量和可靠性要求。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for deploying machine learning models to production. It covers model optimization, serving infrastructure setup, performance tuning, and monitoring. The checklist and workflow help engineers systematically address latency, throughput, and reliability requirements for real-world ML systems.

name: mcp-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert MCP developer specializing in Model Context Protocol server and client development. Masters protocol specification, SDK implementation, and building production-ready integrations between AI systems and external tools/data sources.
description_zh: 一个全面的MCP开发专家技能，为构建模型上下文协议服务器和客户端提供结构化指导，特别强调生产就绪性和安全性。
_original_description: A comprehensive MCP development expert skill providing structured guidance for building Model Context Protocol servers and clients with strong emphasis on production readiness and security.

name: microservices-architect
author: zenobi-us
description: Distributed systems architect designing scalable microservice ecosystems. Masters service boundaries, communication patterns, and operational excellence in cloud-native environments.
description_zh: 一个专门用于设计和实现微服务架构的智能体。它提供从领域分析、服务实现到生产部署的结构化指导，涵盖服务边界划分、通信模式、弹性策略，并集成Kubernetes、Istio和Kafka等工具。
_original_description: A specialized agent for designing and implementing microservices architectures. It provides structured guidance on service decomposition, communication patterns, resilience strategies, and production deployment using tools like Kubernetes, Istio, and Kafka. It follows a phased approach from domain analysis to production hardening.

name: miniproject
author: zenobi-us
description: Simple local project and knowledge management useing markdown files (MDTM).
description_zh: 一个轻量级的项目管理框架，使用 Markdown 文件进行任务跟踪、研究笔记和团队协作。它强制执行结构化工作流，包括行动前规划、内存文件命名约定和清晰的 Git 提交规范。系统依赖本地的 .memory/ 目录进行数据持久化。
_original_description: A lightweight project management framework using markdown files for task tracking, research notes, and team coordination. It enforces structured workflows with pre-action planning, memory file conventions, and clear git commit practices. The system relies on local .memory/ directory for persistence.

name: mise
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert in mise—a fast, flexible polyglot runtime and task manager. Specializes in tool version management, environment variable control, task automation, and shell integration across development workflows.
description_zh: 该技能详细指导如何使用mise，一个多语言运行时和任务管理器。涵盖工具安装、版本锁定、环境变量控制、任务自动化和配置管理。文档包含具体命令示例、mise.toml结构以及开发工作流集成模式。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for using mise, a polyglot runtime and task manager. It covers tool installation, version pinning, environment variable control, task automation, and configuration management. The documentation includes concrete command examples, mise.toml structures, and integration patterns for development workflows.

name: ml-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert ML engineer specializing in machine learning model lifecycle, production deployment, and ML system optimization. Masters both traditional ML and deep learning with focus on building scalable, reliable ML systems from training to serving.
description_zh: 该技能为构建和部署机器学习系统提供结构化指导。涵盖从数据验证到生产监控的完整ML生命周期，包含性能目标的检查清单，并与MLflow、Kubeflow等工具集成。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for building and deploying machine learning systems. It covers the full ML lifecycle from data validation to production monitoring, with specific checklists for performance targets and integration with tools like MLflow and Kubeflow.

name: mlops-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert MLOps engineer specializing in ML infrastructure, platform engineering, and operational excellence for machine learning systems. Masters CI/CD for ML, model versioning, and scalable ML platforms with focus on reliability and automation.
description_zh: 该技能扮演高级MLOps工程师角色，提供构建和管理机器学习平台的系统化指导。涵盖基础设施设计、CI/CD流水线、模型版本控制和监控。采用检查清单和分阶段工作流来评估需求并实施解决方案。
_original_description: This skill acts as a senior MLOps engineer, providing structured guidance for building and managing ML platforms. It covers infrastructure design, CI/CD pipelines, model versioning, and monitoring. The skill uses a checklist and phased workflow approach to assess needs and implement solutions.

name: mobile-app-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert mobile app developer specializing in native and cross-platform development for iOS and Android. Masters performance optimization, platform guidelines, and creating exceptional mobile experiences that users love.
description_zh: 一个专注于iOS、Android及跨平台移动应用开发的专家代理。它提供了从需求分析、实施到上线的结构化工作流，并包含针对应用大小、启动时间和崩溃率等性能指标的具体检查清单。集成了Xcode、Android Studio和Fastlane等工具。
_original_description: A specialized agent for mobile app development across iOS, Android, and cross-platform frameworks. It provides structured workflows for requirements analysis, implementation, and launch, with specific checklists for performance metrics like app size, startup time, and crash rates. Integrates with tools like Xcode, Android Studio, and Fastlane.

name: mobile-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Cross-platform mobile specialist building performant native experiences. Creates optimized mobile applications with React Native and Flutter, focusing on platform-specific excellence and battery efficiency.
description_zh: 该技能为React Native和Flutter移动应用开发提供详细指导，包含具体性能指标（冷启动<2秒，应用大小<50MB）、平台检查清单，并集成了adb、xcode等MCP工具进行调试和部署。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed mobile development guidance for React Native and Flutter projects. It includes specific performance targets (cold start <2s, app size <50MB), platform-specific checklists, and integration with MCP tools like adb and xcode for debugging and deployment.

name: network-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert network engineer specializing in cloud and hybrid network architectures, security, and performance optimization. Masters network design, troubleshooting, and automation with focus on reliability, scalability, and zero-trust principles.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个网络工程师角色，可使用tcpdump、nmap、iperf等标准CLI工具。它定义了一套用于网络分析、设计和运维的结构化流程，重点关注可用性、延迟和安全性。它能与其他基础设施和安全的智能体进行集成协作。
_original_description: This skill provides a network engineer persona with access to standard CLI tools like tcpdump, nmap, and iperf. It outlines a structured workflow for network analysis, design, and operations, focusing on uptime, latency, and security. It integrates with other infrastructure agents for cloud and security tasks.

name: nextjs-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Next.js developer mastering Next.js 14+ with App Router and full-stack features. Specializes in server components, server actions, performance optimization, and production deployment with focus on building fast, SEO-friendly applications.
description_zh: 一个全面的Next.js 14+专家技能，结构优秀，开发流程清晰，重点关注性能优化、SEO和现代App Router模式。
_original_description: A comprehensive Next.js 14+ expert skill with excellent structure, clear development workflows, and strong focus on performance optimization, SEO, and modern App Router patterns.

name: nlp-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert NLP engineer specializing in natural language processing, understanding, and generation. Masters transformer models, text processing pipelines, and production NLP systems with focus on multilingual support and real-time performance.
description_zh: 一款全面的NLP工程技能，覆盖现代NLP任务，流程清晰，专注于构建健壮的多语言生产系统。
_original_description: A comprehensive NLP engineering skill with excellent coverage of modern NLP tasks, clear workflows, and production-focused checklists for building robust multilingual systems.

name: payment-integration
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert payment integration specialist mastering payment gateway integration, PCI compliance, and financial transaction processing. Specializes in secure payment flows, multi-currency support, and fraud prevention with focus on reliability, compliance, and seamless user experience.
description_zh: 该技能为集成Stripe、PayPal、Square、Razorpay、Braintree等多种支付网关提供结构化指导，核心关注PCI DSS合规、欺诈预防和安全交易流程。它明确了从需求分析到实施的完整工作流，涵盖Webhook处理、错误处理和多币种支持。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for integrating multiple payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal, Square, Razorpay, Braintree) with a strong focus on PCI DSS compliance, fraud prevention, and secure transaction flows. It outlines a clear workflow from requirements analysis to implementation, covering webhooks, error handling, and multi-currency support.

name: penetration-tester
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert penetration tester specializing in ethical hacking, vulnerability assessment, and security testing. Masters offensive security techniques, exploit development, and comprehensive security assessments with focus on identifying and validating security weaknesses.
description_zh: 集成 nmap、metasploit、burpsuite 等渗透测试工具的安全评估技能。提供结构化的侦查、漏洞识别、利用验证和影响评估工作流程。包含明确的授权协议和修复建议，专注于道德黑客测试。
_original_description: A security testing tool that integrates nmap, metasploit, burpsuite, and other penetration testing utilities. It provides structured workflows for reconnaissance, vulnerability identification, exploit validation, and impact assessment. Designed for ethical hacking with clear engagement protocols and remediation guidance.

name: performance-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert performance engineer specializing in system optimization, bottleneck identification, and scalability engineering. Masters performance testing, profiling, and tuning across applications, databases, and infrastructure with focus on achieving optimal response times and resource efficiency.
description_zh: 一个全面的性能工程技能，结构清晰，涵盖应用、数据库和基础设施的分析、实施与监控全流程。
_original_description: A comprehensive performance engineering skill with well-structured methodology covering analysis, implementation, and monitoring phases across applications, databases, and infrastructure.

name: performance-monitor
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert performance monitor specializing in system-wide metrics collection, analysis, and optimization. Masters real-time monitoring, anomaly detection, and performance insights across distributed agent systems with focus on observability and continuous improvement.
description_zh: 一个全面的性能监控专家技能，涵盖监控概念、工具和工作流程，结构良好，适用于系统可观测性和优化任务。
_original_description: A comprehensive performance monitoring expert skill with extensive coverage of monitoring concepts, tools, and workflows, well-structured for system observability and optimization tasks.

name: platform-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert platform engineer specializing in internal developer platforms, self-service infrastructure, and developer experience. Masters platform APIs, GitOps workflows, and golden path templates with focus on empowering developers and accelerating delivery.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一套使用Backstage、ArgoCD和Crossplane等工具构建内部开发者平台的系统方法。它通过自助服务模板、GitOps工作流和平台API来减少开发人员的认知负担。其检查清单和分阶段工作流程帮助团队系统地改善资源供给时间和平台采用率。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured approach for building internal developer platforms using tools like Backstage, ArgoCD, and Crossplane. It focuses on reducing developer cognitive load through self-service templates, GitOps workflows, and platform APIs. The checklist and phased workflow help teams systematically improve provisioning times and adoption rates.

name: playwright-testing
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when building e2e tests with Playwright, under deadline pressure to ship incomplete coverage, or struggling with wait strategies and mock-vs-reality tradeoffs - provides patterns for edge case coverage, deterministic waits, and strategic mocking decisions
description_zh: 一份极其实用且观点鲜明的Playwright测试编写指南，强调完整覆盖率、确定性等待和策略性Mock，清晰指出了反模式并提供了可操作的解决方案。
_original_description: An exceptionally practical and opinionated guide for writing reliable Playwright tests, emphasizing complete coverage, deterministic waits, and strategic mocking with clear anti-patterns and actionable solutions.

name: postgres-pro
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert PostgreSQL specialist mastering database administration, performance optimization, and high availability. Deep expertise in PostgreSQL internals, advanced features, and enterprise deployment with focus on reliability and peak performance.
description_zh: 一个专业的 PostgreSQL 数据库专家，负责管理、性能调优、复制和备份。它使用 psql、pg_dump 等标准工具分析配置、优化查询、设置监控，并根据具体的性能目标实施高可用性解决方案。
_original_description: A specialized PostgreSQL database expert that handles administration, performance tuning, replication, and backups. It uses standard PostgreSQL tools like psql and pg_dump to analyze configurations, optimize queries, set up monitoring, and implement high-availability solutions based on concrete performance targets.

name: pr-comment-analyzer
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when analyzing PR review comments to determine relevance, identify ambiguities, and generate a comprehensive report without making code changes. Useful for understanding feedback landscape and initiating collaborative Q&A discussions about unclear or potentially outdated comments.
description_zh: 分析GitHub拉取请求的代码审查评论，评估相关性，识别模糊反馈，生成结构化报告并建议讨论要点。工具为只读分析，不修改代码或解决讨论线程，帮助团队在采取行动前了解审查状态。
_original_description: Analyzes GitHub PR review comments to assess relevance, identify ambiguous feedback, and generate structured reports with suggested Q&A discussion points. Provides read-only analysis without modifying code or resolving threads, helping teams understand review status before taking action.

name: pr-descriptions
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when gh pr edit --body fails silently or returns no error but doesn't persist changes - provides fallback pattern using GitHub REST API directly for reliable PR description updates
description_zh: 一个文档完善的技能，为标准CLI静默失败时更新GitHub PR描述提供了可靠的备用解决方案，示例和故障排除指南非常出色。
_original_description: A well-documented skill providing a reliable fallback solution for updating GitHub PR descriptions when the standard CLI fails silently, with excellent examples and troubleshooting guidance.

name: pr-resolver
author: zenobi-us
description: Automate GitHub pull request review resolution by processing ALL review comments and fixing ALL failing CI checks. Use when: (1) A PR has review comments that need to be addressed and resolved, (2) CI/CD checks are failing and need fixes, (3) You want to process all PR feedback and mark conversations as resolved, (4) You need to iterate on PR feedback quickly. IMPORTANT: This skill processes EVERY comment - no skipping allowed. Always fetches fresh data from GitHub. The only acceptable end state is zero unresolved threads. COMMIT CADENCE: Each thread gets its own commit (fix → commit → resolve → next). Never batch commits at the end.
description_zh: 自动化处理GitHub代码审查，强制要求解决所有评论和CI失败，采用每次修复单独提交的模式。强制获取最新数据，确保最终状态无未解决线程。支持大型PR的分页处理，使用规范提交格式。
_original_description: Automates GitHub PR review resolution by processing every comment and fixing all CI failures with strict commit-per-fix cadence. Enforces fresh data fetching and zero unresolved threads as mandatory requirements. Uses conventional commits and handles pagination for large PRs.

name: product-manager
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert product manager specializing in product strategy, user-centric development, and business outcomes. Masters roadmap planning, feature prioritization, and cross-functional leadership with focus on delivering products that users love and drive business growth.
description_zh: 一个全面的产品管理技能，框架结构清晰，工作流程明确，并与常用工具集成，但在具体实施细节上略显通用。
_original_description: A comprehensive product management skill with well-structured frameworks, clear workflows, and integration with common tools, though somewhat generic in implementation specifics.

name: project-manager
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert project manager specializing in project planning, execution, and delivery. Masters resource management, risk mitigation, and stakeholder communication with focus on delivering projects on time, within budget, and exceeding expectations.
description_zh: 一个全面的项目管理专家技能，结构清晰，涵盖项目规划、执行和收尾全流程，整合了多种工具和方法论，具有较高的实用性。
_original_description: A comprehensive project management expert skill with well-structured frameworks covering planning, execution, and closure phases. It integrates multiple tools and methodologies for practical project oversight.

name: project-planning

description_zh: 一个全面的项目管理框架技能，为AI辅助的项目规划和执行提供结构化工件定义、工作流程阶段和升级协议。
_original_description: A comprehensive project management framework skill that provides structured artifact definitions, workflow phases, and escalation protocols for AI-assisted project planning and execution.

name: projectmanagement
author: zenobi-us
description: Skills for managing projects, tracking progress, and suggesting next actions.
description_zh: 一个基础的项目管理技能，文档极其简略。描述模糊，未说明具体功能或示例。提到跟踪进度和提供建议，但未解释如何实现或使用场景。
_original_description: A basic project management skill with minimal documentation. The description is vague, lacking specific functions or examples. It mentions tracking progress and suggesting actions but provides no details on implementation or use cases.

name: prompt-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert prompt engineer specializing in designing, optimizing, and managing prompts for large language models. Masters prompt architecture, evaluation frameworks, and production prompt systems with focus on reliability, efficiency, and measurable outcomes.
description_zh: 一个全面的提示工程技能，系统覆盖了LLM应用的设计、优化、测试和生产部署全流程。

name: provisioning-with-comtrya

description_zh: 一份全面且注重安全的Comtrya多操作系统配置指南，强调验证、预演测试和结构化部署流程，有效防止系统损坏。
_original_description: A comprehensive and safety-focused guide for using Comtrya in multi-OS provisioning scenarios, emphasizing validation, dry-run testing, and structured rollout to prevent system breakage.

_original_description: This skill provides a detailed framework for Python development, enforcing type hints, async patterns, and security checks. It integrates with tools like black, mypy, and bandit to ensure code quality. The workflow includes environment assessment, implementation phases, and quality assurance steps.

It validates user inputs for multiple-choice, single-choice, and open-ended formats, provides clear feedback on errors, and tracks progress. It generates a summary report with response logs and completion metrics.

_original_description: This skill automates code review requests by dispatching a specialized subagent to analyze changes between git commits. It provides concrete bash commands, clear review triggers, and example workflows for integrating reviews into development cycles. The template-based approach ensures consistent review requests.

It follows a structured methodology with defined phases for planning, implementation, and quality control, aiming to produce actionable reports. It integrates multiple analytical tools including Python, R, and SQL for modeling, with checklists for compliance verification and risk reporting automation.

description_zh: 提供了一套系统性的方法，用于通过调用栈反向追踪错误根源，包含具体示例和调试工具。强调从源头解决问题而非处理表面症状。
_original_description: Provides a systematic method for tracing bugs backward through call stacks to find root causes, with concrete examples and instrumentation techniques. Focuses on fixing problems at their source rather than symptoms.

_original_description: A specialized Rust development assistant that enforces strict coding standards, memory safety, and performance optimization. It provides structured workflows for project analysis, implementation, and verification, integrating tools like cargo, clippy, and miri. Focuses on zero-cost abstractions, ownership patterns, and comprehensive testing.

_original_description: This Skill acts as a virtual Scrum Master, providing structured guidance for agile ceremonies, team facilitation, and process improvement. It integrates with tools like Jira and Confluence to analyze team metrics, remove impediments, and coach teams on Scrum practices. The Skill offers checklists for ceremonies and detailed workflows for common agile scenarios.

The skill integrates with multiple SEO platforms and covers technical audits, content strategy, and performance monitoring.

name: storage-zk

name: subagent-driven-development

description: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session - dispatches fresh subagent for each task with code review between tasks, enabling fast iteration with quality gates
description_zh: 通过为每个任务分配新的子代理并在任务间自动进行代码审查，自动化多任务实施流程。在单个会话中保持开发进度的同时，通过任务间的质量门控及早发现问题。

name: systematic-debugging
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes - four-phase framework (root cause investigation, pattern analysis, hypothesis testing, implementation) that ensures understanding before attempting solutions
description_zh: 一个结构化的四阶段调试框架，强制要求在提出修复方案前进行根本原因分析。它提供了调查错误、分析模式、测试假设和实施解决方案的具体步骤。该技能包含具体的检查清单、危险信号警告，并能与其他调试工具集成。
_original_description: A structured four-phase debugging framework that enforces root cause analysis before proposing fixes. It provides concrete steps for investigating errors, analyzing patterns, testing hypotheses, and implementing solutions. The skill includes specific checklists, red flag warnings, and integrates with other debugging tools.

name: task-distributor
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert task distributor specializing in intelligent work allocation, load balancing, and queue management. Masters priority scheduling, capacity tracking, and fair distribution with focus on maximizing throughput while maintaining quality and meeting deadlines.
description_zh: 一个全面的任务分配专家，具备详细的工作流程、广泛的优化技术和清晰的集成模式，用于在分布式系统中进行智能工作负载分配。
_original_description: A comprehensive task distribution expert with detailed workflow, extensive optimization techniques, and clear integration patterns for intelligent workload allocation across distributed systems.

name: technical-writer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert technical writer specializing in clear, accurate documentation and content creation. Masters API documentation, user guides, and technical content with focus on making complex information accessible and actionable for diverse audiences.
description_zh: 一个全面的技术写作专家技能，包含详细的工作流程、检查清单和文档工具集成，但实现方法略显通用。
_original_description: A comprehensive technical writing expert skill with detailed workflows, checklists, and integration with documentation tools, though somewhat generic in implementation approach.

name: terraform-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Terraform engineer specializing in infrastructure as code, multi-cloud provisioning, and modular architecture. Masters Terraform best practices, state management, and enterprise patterns with focus on reusability, security, and automation.
description_zh: 一个Terraform专家代理，帮助跨多云设计和实施基础设施即代码。它提供模块开发、状态管理、安全扫描和成本估算的结构化工作流，使用terraform、terragrunt、checkov和infracost等工具。
_original_description: A Terraform expert agent that helps design and implement infrastructure as code across multiple clouds. It provides structured workflows for module development, state management, security scanning, and cost estimation using tools like terraform, terragrunt, checkov, and infracost.

name: test-automator
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert test automation engineer specializing in building robust test frameworks, CI/CD integration, and comprehensive test coverage. Masters multiple automation tools and frameworks with focus on maintainable, scalable, and efficient automated testing solutions.
description_zh: 一个全面的测试自动化专家技能，涵盖框架设计、工具集成、CI/CD和多个测试领域，具有结构化的工作流程和清晰的成功指标。
_original_description: A comprehensive test automation expert skill covering framework design, tool integration, CI/CD, and multiple testing domains with structured workflows and clear success metrics.

name: tooling-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert tooling engineer specializing in developer tool creation, CLI development, and productivity enhancement. Masters tool architecture, plugin systems, and user experience design with focus on building efficient, extensible tools that significantly improve developer workflows.
description_zh: 该技能为构建开发者工具提供了一个结构化框架，专注于CLI开发、构建系统和代码生成器。它包含针对性能、用户体验和插件架构的具体检查清单。技能概述了从需求分析到实施的清晰工作流程，并提供了如实现低于100毫秒启动时间的具体示例。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for building developer tools, focusing on CLI development, build systems, and code generators. It includes specific checklists for performance, user experience, and plugin architecture. The skill outlines a clear workflow from needs analysis to implementation, with concrete examples like achieving sub-100ms startup times.

name: trend-analyst
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert trend analyst specializing in identifying emerging patterns, forecasting future developments, and strategic foresight. Masters trend detection, impact analysis, and scenario planning with focus on helping organizations anticipate and adapt to change.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个使用谷歌趋势和社交媒体监听等多数据源分析新兴趋势的结构化框架。它引导用户完成信号检测、模式识别和情景规划，帮助组织预测未来发展。该工具可与市场研究和战略规划等其他智能体集成。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for analyzing emerging trends using multiple data sources like Google Trends and social listening. It guides users through signal detection, pattern recognition, and scenario planning to help organizations anticipate future developments. The tool integrates with other agents for market research and strategic planning.

name: typescript-pro
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert TypeScript developer specializing in advanced type system usage, full-stack development, and build optimization. Masters type-safe patterns for both frontend and backend with emphasis on developer experience and runtime safety.
description_zh: 专注于高级类型系统使用、全栈类型安全和构建优化的TypeScript专家技能。提供结构化的类型分析、实现和质量保证工作流，并集成了特定工具（tsc、eslint、jest、webpack、vite）。
_original_description: A TypeScript expert skill focused on advanced type system usage, full-stack type safety, and build optimization. It provides structured workflows for type analysis, implementation, and quality assurance with specific tool integration (tsc, eslint, jest, webpack, vite).

name: ui-designer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert visual designer specializing in creating intuitive, beautiful, and accessible user interfaces. Masters design systems, interaction patterns, and visual hierarchy to craft exceptional user experiences that balance aesthetics with functionality.
description_zh: 该技能为UI设计任务提供结构化指导，专注于设计系统、组件库和可访问性合规。它定义了从上下文收集开始的清晰工作流程，包含视觉层次和响应式设计的检查清单，并与Figma、Sketch等工具集成。该技能强调与其他代理的协作，并提供用于开发交接的规范。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for UI design tasks, focusing on design systems, component libraries, and accessibility compliance. It defines a clear workflow starting with context gathering, includes checklists for visual hierarchy and responsive design, and integrates with tools like Figma and Sketch. The skill emphasizes collaboration with other agents and delivers specifications for developer handoff.

name: using-superpowers
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes mandatory workflows for finding and using skills, including using Skill tool before announcing usage, following brainstorming before coding, and creating TodoWrite todos for checklists
description_zh: 该技能强制要求AI代理在开始任何任务前必须发现并使用相关技能。它要求检查相关技能、宣布使用情况并严格遵循技能指令。该技能防止代理找借口跳过既定流程，确保遵循最佳实践。
_original_description: This skill enforces mandatory workflows for AI agents to discover and use other skills before starting any task. It requires checking for relevant skills, announcing usage, and following skill instructions exactly. The skill prevents rationalization and skipping established processes.

name: vue-expert
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Vue specialist mastering Vue 3 with Composition API and ecosystem. Specializes in reactivity system, performance optimization, Nuxt 3 development, and enterprise patterns with focus on building elegant, reactive applications.
description_zh: 一个全面的Vue专家技能，涵盖Vue 3生态系统，提供实用的开发指导和系统化的工作流程，适合构建生产级应用。
_original_description: A comprehensive Vue expert skill with excellent coverage of Vue 3 ecosystem, strong practical guidance, and systematic development workflow for building production-ready applications.

name: websocket-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Real-time communication specialist implementing scalable WebSocket architectures. Masters bidirectional protocols, event-driven systems, and low-latency messaging for interactive applications.
description_zh: 该技能为WebSocket系统实现提供结构化指导，涵盖连接处理、扩展模式和部署考量。包含协议实现、安全性和错误处理的具体清单。技能引用Socket.IO、Redis和RabbitMQ等多种工具来构建实时应用。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for implementing WebSocket systems, covering connection handling, scaling patterns, and production considerations. It includes specific checklists for protocol implementation, security, and error handling. The skill references multiple tools like Socket.IO, Redis, and RabbitMQ for building real-time applications.

name: wordpress-master
author: zenobi-us
description: Elite WordPress architect specializing in full-stack development, performance optimization, and enterprise solutions. Masters custom theme/plugin development, multisite management, security hardening, and scaling WordPress from small sites to enterprise platforms handling millions of visitors.
description_zh: 一个专注于WordPress开发的专家代理，涵盖主题创建、插件架构和性能优化。它强制执行从环境上下文收集开始的结构化工作流程，支持wp-cli、composer等工具，并包含编码标准、安全和部署的检查清单。
_original_description: A specialized agent for WordPress development, covering theme creation, plugin architecture, and performance optimization. It enforces a structured workflow starting with context gathering, supports tools like wp-cli and composer, and includes checklists for coding standards, security, and deployment.

name: workflow-orchestrator
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert workflow orchestrator specializing in complex process design, state machine implementation, and business process automation. Masters workflow patterns, error compensation, and transaction management with focus on building reliable, flexible, and observable workflow systems.
description_zh: 一个全面的工作流编排专家，广泛覆盖流程模式、状态管理和错误处理，专为复杂业务流程自动化设计，具有强大的实用价值。
_original_description: A comprehensive workflow orchestration expert with extensive coverage of process patterns, state management, and error handling, designed for complex business process automation with strong practical value.

name: writing-git-commits
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert guide to writing semantic commit messages following the Conventional Commits specification. Master clear, machine-readable commits that communicate intent and drive automation.
description_zh: 该技能指导开发者遵循Conventional Commits规范编写结构化的Git提交信息。它解释了feat、fix、docs等提交类型，展示了信息格式，并链接到包含示例和FAQ的详细子技能。旨在改善团队沟通并支持自动生成变更日志。
_original_description: This skill teaches developers how to write structured Git commit messages following the Conventional Commits specification. It explains commit types like feat, fix, and docs, shows message formatting, and links to detailed sub-skills for examples and FAQs. It's designed to improve team communication and enable automated changelog generation.

name: rust-daily
author: zhanghandong
description:
CRITICAL: Use for Rust news and daily/weekly/monthly reports. Triggers on:
rust news, rust daily, rust weekly, TWIR, rust blog,
Rust 日报, Rust 周报, Rust 新闻, Rust 动态

name: linkai-agent
author: zhayujie
description: Call LinkAI applications and workflows. Use bash with curl to invoke the chat completions API.
_original_description: Call LinkAI applications and workflows. Use bash command to execute like 'bash <base_dir>/scripts/call.sh <app_code> <question>'.

name: skill-creator
author: zhayujie
description: Create, install, or update skills in the workspace. Use when (1) installing a skill from a URL or remote source, (2) creating a new skill from scratch, (3) updating or restructuring existing skills. Always use this skill for any skill installation or creation task.
_original_description: Create or update skills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets. COW simplified version - skills are used locally in workspace.

name: security-review
author: zhukunpenglinyutong
description: 在添加认证、处理用户输入、处理密钥、创建 API 端点或实现支付/敏感功能时使用此 skill。提供全面的安全检查清单和模式。

name: tdd-workflow
author: zhukunpenglinyutong
description: 在编写新功能、修复 bug 或重构代码时使用此 skill。强制执行测试驱动开发，覆盖率要求 80% 以上，包括单元测试、集成测试和 E2E 测试。

name: subtask
author: zippoxer
description: Parallel task orchestration CLI that dispatches work to AI workers (via Claude Code) in isolated git workspaces. Use when the user wants to draft, create, run, or manage tasks, delegate tasks to workers/subagents, or mentions subtask or Subtask.

name: reference
author: zph
description: Research reference material from URLs and create comprehensive documentation. Use this skill when users provide URLs to research, need to gather and synthesize information from web sources, or want to create structured research documentation with citations and summaries.
description_zh: 该技能通过抓取URL内容并转换为Markdown格式，自动创建研究文档。它会将多个来源的资料整理到结构化文件夹中，生成包含摘要、引用和要点的README文件，保留原始内容的同时提供综合分析。
_original_description: This skill automates research documentation by fetching URLs, converting them to markdown, and organizing findings into structured folders. It creates README files with summaries, citations, and key takeaways. The workflow handles multiple sources and maintains original content while providing synthesized analysis.

name: technical-spec
author: zph
description: Write clear, unambiguous system requirements using the EARS (Easy Approach to Requirements Syntax) methodology. Use this skill when writing system requirements, creating technical specifications, validating requirements, or converting natural language to structured EARS format requirements for systems engineering, safety-critical systems, or formal specifications.
description_zh: 该Claude技能使用EARS方法编写系统需求。它将自然语言转换为结构化需求，包含五种模式：通用、状态驱动、事件驱动、可选功能和不良行为。技能包含示例、常见错误提示，并将输出保存为Markdown文件。
_original_description: This Claude Skill helps write system requirements using the EARS methodology. It converts natural language into structured requirements with five patterns: Ubiquitous, State Driven, Event Driven, Optional Feature, and Unwanted Behaviour. The skill includes examples, common mistakes to avoid, and saves output to markdown files.

name: 13f-analyzer
description: Perform various data analysis on SEC 13-F and obtain some insights of fund activities such as number of holdings, AUM, and change of holdings between two quarters.

name: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR)
description: Transcribe audio segments to text using Whisper models. Use larger models (small, base, medium, large-v3) for better accuracy, or faster-whisper for optimized performance. Always align transcription timestamps with diarization segments for accurate speaker-labeled subtitles.
